rulings.Case Title: VICTOR ESPOSTO VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, December 13, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 1. Defendant DANA CORPORATION (NOW KNOWN AS DANA COMPANIES LLC)¿s motion for summary judgment is denied. Defendant failed to satisfy its burden of production that plaintiff does not possess and cannot reasonably obtain evidence that he was exposed to asbestos from Victor gaskets. Defendant¿s separate statement did not address plaintiff¿s deposition testimony that he swept up materials at the Gasket Shop and there is insufficient basis to conclude that the materials that plaintiff swept up did not include asbestos-containing Victor gaskets and that such sweeping up did not expose plaintiff to respirable fibers. The hearing will be at 10:45 a.m. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: ANTHONY LIMA VS. ALTA BUILDING MATERIALS COMPANY et al
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, December 13, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 2. Defendant The Sherwin-Williams Company¿s demurrer to amended complaint is off calendar as it was incorrectly calendared by the clerk since there are no motions heard on Mondays. = (220/JJM)
